Buy for $20 (Reg. $30)

Retractable cables are becoming increasingly common in charging gear, and this Anker model brings that convenience to a car charger. It features a built-in cable that extends up to 29.5 inches and supports dual-device charging, delivering 45W through the cable and 30W via a second USB-C port, with fast charging for phones and laptops.
